summary: Tested Sponsorship Leaderboard and E2E Live Session features. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (leaderboard APIs, live session flow, gallery creation). Frontend: Top Sponsors tab visible in Explore page with correct Beach Mode styling (black bg, white borders). Empty state shown correctly when no monthly sponsors. All requested features working.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/leaderboard/top-sponsors?period=lifetime returns all-time leaderboard with 1 sponsor
GET /api/leaderboard/photographer/{id}/rank returns correct rank and stats
GET /api/leaderboard/photographer/{id}/details returns impact info for Quick Card
E2E live session flow works: go-live → verify active → end → gallery created
ImpactLedger table tracks credits correctly via revenue_routing.py
LeaderboardSnapshot table exists for monthly archives
APScheduler CronTrigger configured for monthly reset (1st at 00:05 UTC)
Top Sponsors tab visible in Explore page with Heart icon
Beach Mode styling confirmed: black bg, white borders
Grom Guardian badge logic implemented (top 10 get is_grom_guardian=true)
Bare except clauses fixed in uploads.py and video_processor.py
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements in Explore.js
seed_data_creation: Live session created during E2E test with gallery auto-created on end-session
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sponsorship Leaderboard fully implemented. Backend APIs: GET /api/leaderboard/top-sponsors (monthly/lifetime), GET /api/leaderboard/photographer/{id}/rank, GET /api/leaderboard/photographer/{id}/details. ImpactLedger tracks every credit routed via revenue_routing.py. Monthly reset via APScheduler CronTrigger. Frontend: Top Sponsors tab in Explore page shows monthly leaderboard with Beach Mode styling. Quick Card bottom sheet implemented but shows empty state when no monthly sponsors. Clicking sponsor card opens Quick Card with impact stats, supported athletes, Message button. Note: Monthly leaderboard is empty (no ImpactLedger entries for current month), lifetime shows 1 sponsor with 6.0 credits given.
